title: Lab 10: ACL And Permissions
description: Apply fine grained access with POSIX ACLs

tasks: Copy /etc/fstab to /var/tmp/fstab-acl. Set the owner and group to root:root and remove all execute bits.
Give natacl read-write access, deny haracl all access, and allow others read only.
hints: The users natacl and haracl are already present for this lab.
Use setfacl for the named user entries.
checks: stat -c '%U:%G' /var/tmp/fstab-acl | grep -qx 'root:root' && ! stat -c '%A' /var/tmp/fstab-acl | grep -q x && getfacl -cp /var/tmp/fstab-acl | grep -qx 'user:natacl:rw-' && getfacl -cp /var/tmp/fstab-acl | grep -qx 'user:haracl:---' && getfacl -cp /var/tmp/fstab-acl | grep -qx 'other::r--'
task_titles: Copy /etc/fstab and set the base ownership and mode
